revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:伊勢塚古墳]]
'''Isezuka Kofun''' (伊勢塚古墳)
* Isezuka Kofun (Takasaki) - Located in {{ill|Takasaki|en|Takasaki|qid=Q336438|lt=Takasaki|1=Takasaki}}, Gunma Prefecture. A designated historic site of Takasaki City. See also {{ill|Yamana Kofun Cluster|ja|山名古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamana Kofun Cluster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579253|1=Yamana Kofun Cluster}}. * {{ill|Isezuka Kofun (Fujioka)|ja|伊勢塚古墳 (藤岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isezuka Kofun (Fujioka)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|en|Fujioka, Gunma|qid=Q596486|lt=Fujioka, Gunma|1=Fujioka, Gunma}}, Gunma Prefecture. A designated historic site of Gunma Prefecture. * {{ill|Isezuka Kofun (Fuji)|ja|伊勢塚古墳 (富士市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isezuka Kofun (Fuji)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579254|1=Isezuka Tomb}} - Located in {{ill|Fuji, Shizuoka|en|Fuji, Shizuoka|qid=Q328613|lt=Fuji, Shizuoka|1=Fuji, Shizuoka}}, Shizuoka Prefecture. A designated historic site of Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Isezuka Kofun (Ichikawamisato)|ja|伊勢塚古墳 (市川三郷町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isezuka Kofun (Ichikawamisato)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135505746|1=Isezuka Kofun (Ichikawamisato)}} - Located in {{ill|Ichikawamisato|en|Ichikawamisato|qid=Q1204453|lt=Ichikawamisato, Yamanashi|1=Ichikawamisato}}, Yamanashi Prefecture. A designated historic site of Ichikawamisato Town. * {{ill|Isezuka Kofun (Chūō)|ja|伊勢塚古墳 (中央市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isezuka Kofun (Chūō)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Chūō, Yamanashi|en|Chūō, Yamanashi|qid=Q666049|lt=Chūō, Yamanashi|1=Chūō, Yamanashi}}, Yamanashi Prefecture. * {{ill|Isezuka Kofun (Kanzaki)|ja|伊勢塚古墳 (神埼市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isezuka Kofun (Kanzaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579255|1=Isezuka Kofun (Kanzaki)}} - Located in {{ill|Kanzaki, Saga|en|Kanzaki, Saga|qid=Q990392|lt=Kanzaki, Saga|1=Kanzaki, Saga}}, Saga Prefecture. A designated historic site of Saga Prefecture.
{{disambiguation}}
